description: Verify build environment is working - run existing tests and CDK synth to confirm baseline is green before making changes.
steps: Run 'mvn test' and confirm all 53 tests pass
Run 'mvn -e -q compile exec:java' to confirm CDK synth succeeds
Create a feature branch 'feat/issue-17-pipeline-testing-deployment-prep' from main
acceptance_criteria: CDK synth produces output without errors
verification: mvn -e -q compile exec:java exits with code 0
findings: All 53 tests pass (0 failures). CDK synth requires NODE_OPTIONS to be cleared (NODE_OPTIONS="" mvn -e -q compile exec:java) because the sandbox sets NODE_OPTIONS=--require /opt/amazon/kiro-agent/proxy-bootstrap.js which breaks Jsii. Surefire plugin already handles this for tests. Feature branch feat/issue-17-pipeline-testing-deployment-prep created from main at e8b2487.
